specs.title: @os-2254 @match @positive MATCH-01 GSTIN matches Karza → application proceeds
@os-2254 @match @negative MATCH-02 GSTIN does NOT match → Rule 0 REJECT
@os-2254 @match @edge MATCH-03 no GSTIN typed → mismatch/defaulter checks skipped
@os-2254 @match @negative MATCH-04 proper GSTIN + WRONG business type (Partnership) → Rule A REJECT (create-side fires even with matching GSTIN)
@os-2254 @match @negative MATCH-05 WRONG GSTIN + WRONG business type → both wrong; Rule 0 (GST_MISMATCH) pre-empts (rejects before OMNI_1)
@os-2254 @match @negative MATCH-06 WRONG GSTIN + empty business type → Rule 0 REJECT (GST_MISMATCH)
@os-2254 @ruleR0 @negative R0-01 GSTIN mismatch → rejection reason says GST_MISMATCH (not generic)
@os-2254 @pcsm @positive PCSM-01 all 7 GST PCSM slots populated with correct values [matched]
@os-2254 @str02 @positive STR02-01 match → Karza businessType overrides the customer's value
@os-2254 @str02 @edge STR02-02 no GSTIN/no match → customer's value kept as-is
